name: Fulltech Co.Ltd.
summary: Fulltech Co.Ltd. manufactures, sells, constructs, and maintains hardware and related products. The company's products include automatic doors, automatic door peripheral products, stainless steel sash products, smoking area systems, security products, and others. It also engages in the sale, operation, and management of the bicycle parking racks and systems. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Sapporo, Japan.
